label: PUBLIC
description: Public. Use for material that can be shared outside Ayra without additional restriction.

label: CONFIDENTIAL:STAFF
description: Confidential to Ayra staff. Use for operational material intended for Ayra staff, not members or public audiences.

label: CONFIDENTIAL:AYRA
description: Confidential to all Ayra Members and Ayra Staff. Use for member-accessible Ayra material that should not be public.

label: CONFIDENTIAL:MEMBER
description: Confidential member-related material. Use when the material identifies, assesses, or depends on a particular member relationship.

label: CONFIDENTIAL:BOARD
description: Confidential to the Board. Use for material restricted to Board review, deliberation, or decision-making.
